growth_records.lvlwhy: species-level trait compilation (Madin) — no strain recorded in source
growth_records.cite: Madin JS et al. A synthesis of bacterial and archaeal phenotypic trait data. Sci Data 7:170 (2020); source dataset: corkrey.
growth_records.notes: growth_rate_per_h computed as ln(2)/doubling_time_h. Species-level trait record; culture mode/pH often unspecified; medium + uptake/secretion pending literature curation.

growth_records.cite: Zeidan, Ahmad A et al. Stable coexistence of two Caldicellulosiruptor species in a de novo constructed hydrogen-producing co-culture. Microbial Cell Factories (2010). DOI:10.1186/1475-2859-9-102. [PMC3022713]
growth_records.snippet: Table 4 glucose-limited: Caldicellulosiruptor kristjanssonii D=0.06 h-1, YH2=3.5, QH2=4.8, qH2=17.8 mmol/gCDW/h, biomass 0.27 gCDW/L, residual glucose 0 mM
growth_records.notes: Glucose-LIMITED chemostat (glucose 4 g/L=22.2 mM sole substrate). chemostat. mu=D=0.06/h; td=ln2/D=11.55 h. qH2=17.8, QH2=4.8 from Table 4; Ysx=11.7 gCDW/mol glucose; X=0.27 gCDW/L; residual glucose 0 mM. qGlc=D*(22.2-0)/0.27=0.06*(22.2)/0.27=4.933 mmol/gCDW/h.

growth_records.snippet: Table 4 glucose-limited: Caldicellulosiruptor kristjanssonii D=0.15 h-1, YH2=3.0, QH2=10.3, qH2=34.6 mmol/gCDW/h, biomass 0.3 gCDW/L, residual glucose 0.2 mM
growth_records.notes: Glucose-LIMITED chemostat (glucose 4 g/L=22.2 mM sole substrate). chemostat. mu=D=0.15/h; td=ln2/D=4.62 h. qH2=34.6, QH2=10.3 from Table 4; Ysx=13.0 gCDW/mol glucose; X=0.3 gCDW/L; residual glucose 0.2 mM. qGlc=D*(22.2-0.2)/0.3=0.15*(22.0)/0.3=11.0 mmol/gCDW/h.
